CustomField.formula:
Date_DESNZ_RAG_Rating_Applied__c - Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c -
(
FLOOR((Date_DESNZ_RAG_Rating_Applied__c - Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c)/7)*2
+
IF(AND(WEEKDAY(Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c )=1, WEEKDAY(Date_DESNZ_RAG_Rating_Applied__c )<>7),1,
IF(CASE(WEEKDAY(Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c ),1,8,WEEKDAY(Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c ))>CASE(WEEKDAY(Date_DESNZ_RAG_Rating_Applied__c ),1,8,WEEKDAY(Date_DESNZ_RAG_Rating_Applied__c )),2,
IF(OR (WEEKDAY(Date_DESNZ_RAG_Rating_Applied__c )=7, WEEKDAY(Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c )=1),1,
IF(OR (WEEKDAY(Date_DESNZ_RAG_Rating_Applied__c )=1, WEEKDAY(Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c )=7),2,
0)))))
CustomField.label: Actual DESNZ Days Response Time
